# yii3-ab-testing

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-ab-testing
```

## Rules

- Experiment/variant names: `/^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$/`
- Hash: `hexdec(substr(sha256(salt . ':' . subjectId), 0, 8))` — 32-bit unsigned
- assign()/is() are pure — no auto-tracking
- Disabled experiment → fallbackVariant
- Forced variant must be in experiment's variant list
- AbTesting requires an ExperimentProvider (ConfigExperimentProvider or a `-db` backend); core di does NOT bind it
- ExposureTracker/ConversionTracker default to no-op Null*; core di does NOT bind them. Built-in sinks: Logger* (PSR-3), Null*; bind one in app config
- Unknown experiment → InvalidExperimentException; unknown forced variant → InvalidVariantException
- ExperimentRegistry is lazy: provider queried on first access, memoized; reset() re-reads (worker runtimes)
- Requires 64-bit PHP (hash bucket exceeds PHP_INT_MAX on 32-bit)

## API

### Experiment

```php
$exp = new Experiment(
    name: 'checkout-button',
    enabled: true,
    salt: 'checkout-v1',
    fallbackVariant: 'control',
    variants: ['control' => 50, 'green' => 50],
    targeting: null, // optional TargetingRule; null = no restriction
);

// Targeting rules: restrict experiment to a subset of subjects.
// Subjects that don't match get fallbackVariant with isFallback=true, isTargetingMismatch=true.
// forcedVariant bypasses targeting. Disabled experiment check runs before targeting.
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3AbTesting\EnvironmentTargetingRule;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3AbTesting\AttributeTargetingRule;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3AbTesting\AndTargetingRule;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3AbTesting\OrTargetingRule;

$targeting = new AndTargetingRule(rules: [
    new EnvironmentTargetingRule(environments: ['production']),
    new AttributeTargetingRule(attribute: 'plan', value: 'pro'),
]);
// OrTargetingRule: any rule matches. Empty rules list throws InvalidArgumentException.
```

### ExperimentProvider (experiment source)

```php
// interface: getExperiments(): array<string, Experiment>
$provider = new ConfigExperimentProvider(config: [
    'checkout-button' => [
        'enabled' => true,
        'salt' => 'checkout-v1',
        'fallbackVariant' => 'control',
        'variants' => ['control' => 50, 'green' => 50],
    ],
]);
// or a database-backed provider from yii3-ab-testing-db
```

### AbTesting facade

```php
$ab = new AbTesting(
    provider: $provider,
    strategy: new WeightedHashAssignmentStrategy(),
    exposureTracker: new NullExposureTracker(),
    conversionTracker: new NullConversionTracker(),
);

$assignment = $ab->assign(experiment: 'checkout-button', subjectId: $userId);
$assignment->variant;       // 'control' or 'green'
$assignment->isForced;      // false
$assignment->isFallback;    // false

$ab->is(experiment: 'checkout-button', variant: 'green', subjectId: $userId); // bool

// Forced (QA):
$ab->assign(experiment: 'checkout-button', subjectId: $userId, forcedVariant: 'green');

// Tracking (explicit):
$ab->trackExposure($assignment);
$ab->trackConversion($assignment, goal: 'purchase');
```

### Assignment

```php
$a = new Assignment(experiment: 'exp', variant: 'green', subjectId: 'u1');
$a->isVariant('green');       // true
$a->isForced;                  // false
$a->isFallback;                // false
$a->isSticky;                  // false (true when served from an AssignmentStore)
$a->isTargetingMismatch;       // false (true when subject excluded by TargetingRule)
$a->context;                   // ?AssignmentContext (null unless passed to assign())
```

### ExperimentRegistry

```php
$registry = $ab->getRegistry();
$registry->get('checkout-button'); // Experiment, throws InvalidExperimentException if unknown
$registry->has('checkout-button'); // bool
$registry->all();                  // array<string, Experiment>
$registry->reset();                // drop memo; provider re-read on next access
```

### AssignmentContext (optional)

```php
// Carried into Assignment for tracker attribution; does NOT affect variant choice.
$ctx = AssignmentContext::forEnvironment('production')->withAttribute('country', 'DE');
$assignment = $ab->assign(experiment: 'exp', subjectId: 'u1', context: $ctx);
// getters: getEnvironment(), getAttributes(), getAttribute(name)
// only assign() takes a context (is() does not)
```

### Trackers

```php
interface ExposureTracker {
    public function trackExposure(Assignment $assignment): void;
}

interface ConversionTracker {
    public function trackConversion(Assignment $assignment, string $goal): void;
}

// Built-in sinks (bind one in app config — core di binds none):
//   NullExposureTracker / NullConversionTracker     — no-op defaults
//   LoggerExposureTracker / LoggerConversionTracker — one structured PSR-3 record
//     per event; ctor(LoggerInterface $logger, string $level = LogLevel::INFO)
$exposure = new LoggerExposureTracker($psrLogger);

// Buffering sinks (e.g. ClickHouse adapter) implement FlushableTracker;
// call flush() once at request end.
interface FlushableTracker {
    public function flush(): void;
}

// Fan one event out to several sinks (variadic). One source must own each
// tracker key in di, so apps bind these in their own root-layer config.
// Composites implement FlushableTracker and propagate flush() to flushable inners.
$exposure = new CompositeExposureTracker($trackerA, $trackerB);
$conversion = new CompositeConversionTracker($trackerA, $trackerB);
```

### AssignmentStore (sticky variant, optional)

```php
// Pure contract (no HTTP). Pins a subject to a variant across weight changes.
// Implementations: yii3-ab-testing-web (cookie/session). assign() stays pure.
interface AssignmentStore {
    public function get(string $experiment, string $subjectId): ?string;
    public function put(string $experiment, string $subjectId, string $variant): void;
}
```

### Yii3 DI config

Core `config/di.php` binds only `AbTesting` + `AssignmentStrategy`. It does NOT
bind `ExperimentProvider` / `ExposureTracker` / `ConversionTracker` — one source
owns each (app or backend), or `yiisoft/config` throws `Duplicate key`.

Define experiments in app's `config/params.php`:

```php
return [
    'rasuvaeff/yii3-ab-testing' => [
        'experiments' => [
            'checkout-button' => [
                'enabled' => true,
                'salt' => 'checkout-v1',
                'fallbackVariant' => 'control',
                'variants' => ['control' => 50, 'green' => 50],
            ],
        ],
    ],
];
```

Then bind the provider once in app `config/common/di/*.php` (or install
`yii3-ab-testing-db`, which binds it for you):

```php
return [
    ExperimentProvider::class => [
        'class' => ConfigExperimentProvider::class,
        '__construct()' => ['config' => $params['rasuvaeff/yii3-ab-testing']['experiments']],
    ],
];
```
